changeSet.author: smslog-plugin
smslog-plugin
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE plugin_smslog_data DROP COLUMN messagebody;

changeSet.author: smslog-plugin
smslog-plugin

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plugins WHERE identifier = 'smslog'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO plugins ( identifier, name, description, javascriptmodulefile, functionsviewtemplate, settingsviewtemplate, namelocalizationkey, settingspermission, functionspermission, devicefunctionspermission, disabled ) VALUES ( 'smslog', 'plugin.smslog.localization.plugin.name', '', 'app/components/plugins/smslog/smslog.module.js', 'app/components/plugins/smslog/views/modal.html', 'app/components/plugins/smslog/views/settings.html', 'plugin.smslog.localization.plugin.name', 'plugin_smslog_access', 'plugin_smslog_access', 'plugin_smslog_access', false );

changeSet.author: smslog-plugin

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM permissions WHERE name = 'plugin_smslog_access'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permissions (name, description) VALUES ('plugin_smslog_access', 'Access to SMS Log Plugin');

changeSet.author: smslog-plugin
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO userrolepermissions (roleid, permissionid) SELECT ur.id, p.id FROM userroles ur, permissions p WHERE ur.name = 'Super-Admin' AND p.name = 'plugin_smslog_access';
